englishDefinitions: To move something, especially a makeup brush or applicator, smoothly from one side of the eyelid to the other.
To apply makeup in a light, sweeping motion across the eyelid.
persianTranslation: با حرکت نرم روی پلک پخش کن
examples: Take a little eyeshadow on the brush and sweep it across the lid.
For a natural look, sweep it across the lid and blend the edges.
She showed me how to sweep it across the lid without using too much color.
